name: Hyperspectral Kinematics Detuning
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist preparing a heavy multirotor to carry a sensitive $40,000 Resonon Pika L push-broom hyperspectral scanner. To prevent motion blur and spatial distortion, configure the drone's flight parameters in QGroundControl based on the physical constraints (speed, acceleration, and angle) found in the sensor integration manual at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/hyperspectral_integration.txt. Modify the ANGLE_MAX, WPNAV_SPEED, WPNAV_ACCEL, WPNAV_ACCEL_Z, WPNAV_SPEED_UP, and WPNAV_SPEED_DN parameters, ensuring you convert the manual's physical units into the internal units required by the flight controller (e.g., cm/s, cm/s/s, and centidegrees). Create a sign-off text file at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_signoff.txt of at least 50 characters confirming the kinematics have been detuned for the hyperspectral payload.
